eng.definition: dislike of or prejudice against people from other countries
examples: His xenophobia was evident in his hateful comments.
The rise of xenophobia in some parts of the world is alarming.
The campaign was aimed at combating xenophobia and promoting tolerance.
योग से शरीर और मन को विश्राम मिलता है।
विश्राम के बिना, हम अपनी पूरी क्षमता से काम नहीं कर सकते।
